description: Analyze FPGA fabric to find optimal PBLOCK region for re-placement. READ-ONLY. Uses smart_region_search to find optimal fabric region, returns region coordinates, pblock_ranges string, estimated resources and suggested Vivado next steps. Use the returned pblock_ranges to call Vivado tools yourself. Trigger: recommendation == 'PBLOCK' or avg spread > 70 tiles.

target_lut_count.description: Current LUT usage from Vivado report_utilization_for_pblock

target_ff_count.description: Current FF usage from Vivado report_utilization_for_pblock

returns.description: Analysis data (NOT a StrategyPlan). Region coordinates, pblock_ranges, resource estimates, and next_steps.

region.description: col_min, col_max, row_min, row_max, center_col, center_row, columns_used, rows_used

target_resources.description: luts, ffs, dsps, brams (with multiplier applied)

next_steps.description: Vivado tools to call after analysis
